scripts.sync-and-deploy: node scripts/sync-from-sheet.mjs && git add src/data/content.js src/data/events.js src/data/photos.js && git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m 'sync content from sheet' && git push && git push heroku main
scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.config.ssr.js && node scripts/prerender.mjs
